title: Loader Working-Copy Restoration And Integrity Gate
objective: Implement the smallest bounded follow-on after packet 020f by restoring apps/mutation-seam/app/schedule/loader.py to a source-controlled ast.parse-clean state, re-establishing the truthful packet-020d loader baseline under observation, and adding a minimal integrity gate so future packet claims cannot rely on stale bytecode or truncated source, without broadening bridge routes, PM UI behavior, or operational write paths.
constrained_outputs: One bounded restoration of apps/mutation-seam/app/schedule/loader.py to an ast.parse-clean, source-controlled state
One focused integrity gate proving the loader working copy is parseable before packet validation claims are accepted
Focused validation evidence re-establishing the truthful current packet-020d baseline against the restored loader source
validation_steps: Confirm loader.py passes ast.parse from source, not just import from stale bytecode
Confirm the restored loader re-establishes or truthfully revises the packet-020d baseline test claim under observation
Confirm no bridge route, PM UI, SQL, or operational write-path changes are introduced
Confirm the integrity gate is documented so future packet closeouts cannot silently rely on a broken working copy
sql_permission_note: Packet 020e.1 is source restoration and integrity gating only. No SQL, no bridge changes, no PM UI changes, and no write-surface expansion are authorized.
